'''Battlefield Subjugation Floatie''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] vehicle used by [[Raygar|Dr. Raygar]] to steal the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]] from the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]].<ref name="Ewoks" />

{{Veh-stub}}

*{{Ewoks|Battle for the Sunstar}} {{1st}}
